title: diemisa capitata
intro: Diemisa capitata, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, is also known as the False Daisy or Common Daisy. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Diemisa capitata include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Diemisa capitata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
